race.comment: PRINCE EPAULETTE (1) will be fitter for a recent trial coming into this and built into the campaign nicely last time in work. Now with the Hayley barn, the 1407m trip fresh looks to suit and he'll appreciate the easier company today. Can make an impression on his return. CRAMPIN' MY STYLE (5) lands here as a gelding off a 38-day break and that can see him improve. His form in recent runs isn't too bad for a race of this quality, and now with his mind on the job he can make his presence felt. TRULY SUPREME (7) missed narrowly his past couple and that form rates strongly. Needs some luck from the barrier, but if the splits come then his recent efforts say he's good enough. FLAMING DRAGON (4) led and won here last time out and can repeat the dose from a good draw. ARCHENEMY (2) is better than he showed last time out and can bounce back to form stepping up in distance.
